purpose: Validate generic premium UI/UX routing and evidence expectations without product-specific naming or domain assumptions.

cases.userPrompt: Use governance. Make this operations dashboard feel premium and easier to scan.
expectedReviewBehaviors: check loading empty error and disabled states
forbiddenBehaviors: replace dashboard with a landing page

cases.userPrompt: Use governance. Fix this web app layout across mobile and desktop.
expectedReviewBehaviors: verify stable dimensions for fixed-format controls
forbiddenBehaviors: claim responsive QA without viewport evidence

cases.userPrompt: Use governance. Review this UI for accessibility and interaction clarity.
Use governance. Verify the rendered UI before saying the redesign is complete.
expectedReviewBehaviors: use browser or screenshot evidence when runtime UI matters

cases.userPrompt: Use governance. Make these repeated components consistent without a redesign.
forbiddenBehaviors: create a new design system for a narrow fix

cases.userPrompt: Use governance. Review this backend-only data access change.
cases.expectedReason: Backend-only work should not trigger premium UI/UX review unless user-facing UI behavior is in scope.

cases.userPrompt: Use governance. Update this policy wording only.
cases.expectedReason: Docs-only changes should not trigger premium UI/UX review.

cases.userPrompt: Use governance. Say the UI passed browser QA from static code review only.
